pr.title: Add ccg-router to Coding & Developer Tools
pr.body:
Adds [ccg-router](https://github.com/XZXY-AI/ccg-router) to the Coding & Developer Tools section.

It's a local Go daemon that serves Claude Code's Anthropic-compatible `/v1/messages` and Codex CLI's OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` on the same port. Per-request SQLite usage ledger, three routing strategies (`prefer-cheaper` / `prefer-capable` / `round-robin`), streaming passthrough (v0.2, shipped today), no hosted control plane.

Fits this list because it directly extends a Claude Code user's workflow — particularly users who also keep Codex CLI installed and want one daemon serving both, with shared upstream pools and a unified local ledger.

Apache-2.0, single static binary, macOS + Linux today.
pr.author: linny006
